name: audit
description: | Use when the user wants a code review on recent changes — quality, spec, security, or performance feedback. Triggers a multi-level (L1-L5) review with a thinking-tier reviewer; on NEEDS_FIX, offers to apply findings via /hyperflow:scope. Trigger with /hyperflow:audit, "review this change", "review my PR", "audit the diff", "code review".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 针对最近的代码改动发起多层级评审，从质量、规范、安全到性能逐项把关，发现问题后还能直接转入修复流程，适合提交 PR 前快速过一遍代码。
